full_text: The definition of 'digital market' under Section 2(1)(g) is ambiguous and requires legislative clarification to avoid litigation uncertainty. Section 5 imposes per se prohibitions that are disproportionate without case-by-case analysis. The mandatory self-assessment framework under Section 9 is constructive and we support its implementation. Section 47 sunset clause timeline of 3 years is insufficient for compliance planning. We strongly recommend that the appeal mechanism under Section 40 align with established CCI procedures under the Competition Act 2002.
